case_title: PAMONAG LUNA B. et al VS BAYANGOS ESTELITA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYANGOS ESTELITA BAYANGOS APOLONIO BY PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23398, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BAYANGOS ESTELITA BAYANGOS APOLONIO RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT PAMONAG LUNA B. FERRIS JACK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $103.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,103.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BAYANGOS ESTELITA BAYANGOS APOLONIO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT PAMONAG LUNA B. FERRIS JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF FERRIS JACK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BAYANGOS ESTELITA BAYANGOS APOLONIO RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT PAMONAG LUNA B. FERRIS JACK $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAMONAG LUNA B. FERRIS JACK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYANGOS ESTELITA BAYANGOS APOLONIO $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $185.00, ALLOCATED AS FOLLOWS: $150 ATORNEY'S FEES & $35 COSTS. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23398 ON 2-23-95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BAYANGOS ESTELITA BAYANGOS APOLONIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT PAMONAG LUNA B. FERRIS JACK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF PAMONAG LUNA B.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAMONAG LUNA B. FERRIS JACK
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAYANGOS ESTELITA BAYANGOS APOLONIO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
